summary: Group Deal Campaign System testing complete. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Admin page at /admin/group-deals shows campaign list with progress bars, stats cards, finalize/cancel actions. Create Campaign dialog has live profit calculator showing margin per unit, total margin, safety status. Public pages at /group-deals (list) and /group-deals/{id} (detail) show deal cards with progress bars, countdown timers, join modal with name/phone/payment fields, trust messaging.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed campaigns for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Group Deal Campaign System verified. Key features: (1) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns creates campaign with margin calculation and 5% minimum margin safety check. (2) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id}/join creates commitment and increments count. (3) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id}/finalize creates orders with sales_channel=group_deal for all committed buyers. (4) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id}/cancel marks campaign failed and commitments for refund. (5) GET /api/public/group-deals returns active campaigns WITHOUT internal pricing fields (vendor_cost, margin_per_unit, margin_pct, vendor_threshold hidden). (6) Admin UI at /admin/group-deals shows campaign list with progress bars, stats cards (Active Campaigns, Target Reached, Total Commitments), finalize/cancel buttons. (7) Create Campaign dialog has live ProfitCalculator component showing margin/unit, margin %, total margin, safety status. (8) Public UI at /group-deals shows deal cards with progress bars and countdown timers. (9) Public detail at /group-deals/{id} shows join button, progress, trust messaging (refund guarantee, secure payment). (10) Join modal collects name, phone, payment method. (11) Known campaign: HP ProBook 450 G8 Laptop at TZS 960,000 (20% off), 1 joined, 49 spots left, 14d remaining.

details: POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns creates campaign with margin calculation
Price below vendor cost returns 400 error
Internal fields hidden: vendor_cost, margin_per_unit, margin_pct, vendor_threshold, commission_mode, affiliate_share_pct, created_by
GET /api/public/group-deals/{id} returns deal detail without internal fields
Stats cards: Active Campaigns, Target Reached, Total Commitments
Campaign list with progress bars showing Price, Margin, Progress, Revenue
New Campaign button opens create dialog
Form fields: Product Name, Description, Vendor Cost, Original Price, Deal Price, Display Target, Vendor Threshold, Duration, Commission Mode
Live Profit Calculator shows: Vendor Cost, Final Price, Margin/Unit, Margin %, Discount, Target, Total Margin
Safety status: SAFE/WARNING/BLOCKED based on margin
Progress bar with joined count and spots left
Trust messaging: Full refund if deal doesn't complete, Secure payment, X people already joined
Join modal opens on button click
Payment method select (Cash, Mobile Money, Bank Transfer)
